x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Intent coverage measures how well VA topics cover actual employee inquiry types. Now Assist AI requires comprehensive intent coverage to reduce agent escalation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review unpublished active topics and publish those that are complete and tested. Target: 80%+ of active topics published. Unpublished topics represent intent gaps that Now Assist VA cannot cover.
